title: V1.4 WS4 — statig daemon lifecycle HSM (TD-9 closure)

metadata.description: Replace nexus42d's single-state 'running-probe' with the full 6-state statig HSM (Stopped/Starting/Running/Degraded/Stopping/Failed). Expose the v2 GET /v1/local/daemon/status superset response (schema_version: 2, subsystems{}, degraded{}) wire-compatible with the v1 probe. Closes TD-9.
metadata.parallelism: parallel with WS2 (no file overlap except crates/nexus42d/src/main.rs touch)
commits: 1594532 feat(daemon/lifecycle): statig HSM with Event enum and transitions (WS4 T1-T3)
c3edac4 feat(daemon/lifecycle): entry/exit actions + SubsystemBootstrap trait (WS4 T4)
da3d2f4 feat(daemon): main.rs uses statig lifecycle; SIGTERM/SIGINT/panic bridged (WS4 T6)
0f6e333 docs(knowledge): TD-9 row moves from Partial to Resolved (v2) (WS4 T7)
f4deeb6 chore(ws4): lint fixes for final CI gate (WS4 T8)
b66dd60 fix(daemon): address QC criticals — HSM init, exit race, uptime field (WS4 qc-rework)
metadata.td_closed: TD-9 (daemon state machine not implemented) -> Resolved (v2)
metadata.residual_summary: R1(medium): WS2 engine stub; R2(low): dispatch task ordering; R3(low): started_at unset; R4(nit): hardcoded test sleeps
